name: Filter bank
description: A fixed filter/resonator bank based on the disting EX algorithm. Provides a bank of parallel stereo bandpass filters or resonators. Filters can be mono, stereo, or up to 8 channels wide. Supports Resonator, Bandpass, and Multiband modes. The number of filters can be increased to 12.
gui_description: The display shows the notes to which each filter is tuned, overlaid on a bar to represent the envelope level of the voice.

input_ports.name: Audio input busses
input_ports.description: The number of audio input busses (e.g. set to 2 for stereo).
